name: Call Button for Customer
Go to CRM Leads from Customer
Create Lead from Customer
Customer 360 View
script:
frappe.ui.form.on('Customer', { refresh: function(frm) { $('#customer-360-panel').remove() frm.add_custom_button('Create Cross Sell Lead', function() { let d = new frappe.ui.Dialog({ title: 'Create Cross Sell Lead', fields: [ {label: 'Entity', fieldname: 'entity', fieldtype: 'Select', options: ['Aionion Insurance','Aionion Capital','US Subscription'].join('\n'), reqd: 1}, {label: 'Product', fieldname: 'product', fieldtype: 'Select', options: ['Insurance Sales','Insurance Renewals','Account Opening','Bonds','Mutual Funds','US Subscription'].join('\n'), reqd: 1} ], primary_action_label: 'Create Lead', primary_action: function(values) { frappe.call({ method: 'aionion_custom.aionion_custom.controllers.customer.create_cross_sell_lead', args: {customer_name: frm.doc.name, entity: values.entity, product: values.product}, freeze: true, callback: function(r) { if (r.message) { frappe.msgprint('Cross-sell lead created: ' + r.message); d.hide() } } }) } }) d.show() }, 'Actions') frappe.call({ method: 'aionion_custom.aionion_custom.controllers.customer.get_customer_360', args: { customer_name: frm.doc.name }, callback: function(r) { if (!r.message) return const data = r.message const products = data.products const customer = data.customer let html = `

🎯 Customer 360

Master ID: ${customer.aionion_master_id || 'Not assigned'} | Mobile: ${customer.mobile || '-'} | PAN: ${customer.pan || '-'}
` if (products.insurance && products.insurance.length > 0) { html += `
🛡️ Insurance Records (${products.insurance.length}) ` products.insurance.forEach(p => { html += `` }) html += '
Record Type Policy No Status Expiry
${p.name} ${p.insurance_products || '-'} ${p.policy_number || '-'} ${p.policy_status || '-'} ${p.policy_expiry_date || '-'}
' } if (products.renewals && products.renewals.length > 0) { html += `
🔄 Renewal Records (${products.renewals.length}) ` products.renewals.forEach(p => { html += `` }) html += '
Record Type Expiry Status Renewals RM
${p.name} ${p.insurance_type || '-'} ${p.policy_expiry_date || '-'} ${p.renewal_status || '-'} ${p.renewals_rm_name || 'Not assigned'}
' } if (products.us_subscription && products.us_subscription.length > 0) { html += `
🌐 US Subscription (${products.us_subscription.length}) ` products.us_subscription.forEach(p => { html += `` }) html += '
Record Status Amount End Date
${p.name} ${p.client_status || '-'} ₹${(p.amount_paid_us_subs || 0).toLocaleString()} ${p.subscription_end_date || '-'}
' } if (products.bonds && products.bonds.length > 0) { html += `
📈 Bonds (${products.bonds.length}) ` products.bonds.forEach(p => { html += `` }) html += '
Record Units Amount Execution Date
${p.name} ${p.number_of_units || 0} ₹${(p.amount_bonds || 0).toLocaleString()} ${p.execution_date || '-'}
' } if (products.mutual_funds && products.mutual_funds.length > 0) { html += `
💰 Mutual Funds (${products.mutual_funds.length}) ` products.mutual_funds.forEach(p => { html += `` }) html += '
Record Amount Order Type
${p.name} ₹${(p.amount_mf || 0).toLocaleString()} ${p.order_type || '-'}
' } if (products.equity && products.equity.length > 0) { html += `
📊 Equity / Account Opening (${products.equity.length}) ` products.equity.forEach(p => { html += `` }) html += '
Record PAN Client Code
${p.name} ${p.pan || '-'} ${p.client_code || '-'}
' } const total = Object.values(products).reduce((a, b) => a + (b ? b.length : 0), 0) if (total === 0) { html += '
No product records found
' } html += '
' frm.layout.wrapper.find('.form-page').prepend($(html)) } }) } })

name: Insurance Renewal Record — MIS Actions
